policy.secret_rule: Never ask for passwords, cookies, recovery codes, payment details, raw tokens or .env contents in chat.
policy.write_rule: Write-capable connectors require CEO/Codex review and the matching HumanGate before use.

ui_state_model.manifest_state_source: tier and setup_mode fields in this file — policy only, not proof of live connectivity
ui_state_model.evidence_state_source: .company-os/operations/preflight-results/<connector-id>-latest.json written by the verify_command or guided setup wizard
ui_state_model.connected_requires: evidence file must exist and contain ok:true; gated connectors require the declared HumanGate release evidence regardless of any evidence file
ui_state_model.gated_override_rule: gated and optional_gated connectors never transition to connected via an evidence file alone; the declared HumanGate must be released first

connectors.name: Local Company.OS Workspace
connectors.purpose: Find onboarding packets, local memory, install state, workspace registry and source-of-truth docs.
connectors.human_gate: HG-1 before persisting corrected company facts

connectors.name: AionUI + Hermes Runtime
connectors.purpose: Provide the operator shell, EVE runtime soul, default model route and sidecar-local context bundle.
connectors.auth_method: local profile plus configured model provider
connectors.human_gate: HG-2 before changing runtime auth/model defaults for a client
connectors.memory_policy: runtime cache only unless the install packet permits persistence

connectors.name: Plane Execution Ledger
connectors.purpose: Hold Company.OS parent contracts, child worker contracts, status, blockers and review gates.
connectors.auth_method: Plane App connector preferred; app-token bridge fallback
blocked_actions: migrate or duplicate existing ledgers without review
connectors.human_gate: HG-3 before write-capable ledger changes; Done stays Founder/CEO authority
connectors.memory_policy: execution truth only; do not store private raw memory in Plane

connectors.name: Honcho Memory
connectors.purpose: Provide durable cross-session memory once the founder approves persistence boundaries.
connectors.auth_method: configured Honcho MCP or scoped workspace token
connectors.verify_command: manual connector preflight: query/create test conclusion in the approved workspace only
blocked_actions: mix personal, app-user and developer workspaces
connectors.human_gate: HG-2 before first durable memory write
connectors.memory_policy: explicit consent per workspace; never raw secrets or private raw chats

connectors.name: Obsidian Brain Interface
connectors.purpose: Provide a local visual cockpit over existing Company.OS Markdown truth without creating a second memory or execution ledger.
connectors.auth_surface: Obsidian desktop app and local workspace folder
safe_preflight: Confirm Obsidian mode: disabled, read_cockpit, dashboard_bases or activity_log_spike
Confirm .obsidian state remains local-only unless reviewed
Confirm community plugins are disabled for baseline
Confirm Web Viewer is disabled or public-only
connectors.verify_command: manual: open the existing workspace root as local vault and complete .company-os/operations/obsidian-brain-interface.md
blocked_actions: use Web Viewer for sensitive apps
copy Plane or Honcho state as a second ledger
connectors.human_gate: HG-1 for local read cockpit; HG-2 before activity-log hooks; HG-3 before team-wide settings or custom plugins
connectors.memory_policy: interface only; durable memory remains in approved Company.OS memory layers

connectors.name: GitHub + GitNexus
connectors.purpose: Support code delegation, repo discovery, codegraph impact analysis, PRs and update paths.
connectors.auth_method: GitHub CLI/OAuth plus local GitNexus index
safe_preflight: Run git status in target repos
Run gitnexus impact before symbol edits
blocked_actions: grant broad repo scopes by default
send private repo content to external workers without redaction
connectors.human_gate: HG-3 before write-capable GitHub actions; HG-4 for public release positioning
connectors.memory_policy: store repo metadata and decisions, not secrets or raw private prompts

connectors.name: Google Calendar + Drive
connectors.purpose: Use calendar as attention layer and Drive/Docs as source documents for company setup and reporting.
safe_preflight: List calendars or Drive files read-only before writes
connectors.verify_command: connector-specific: list calendars or search Drive read-only
blocked_actions: reading unrelated personal Drive without scope
connectors.human_gate: HG-2 for read scopes; HG-3 for write/share actions
connectors.memory_policy: summaries only; preserve document links and access boundaries

connectors.name: Google Mail
connectors.purpose: Optional communication connector for later reply queues, outreach and stakeholder follow-up.
connectors.auth_method: Google OAuth with explicit mail scopes
safe_preflight: Run read-only label/search test before any draft
connectors.human_gate: HG-4 before sending or public/stakeholder communication
connectors.memory_policy: do not persist raw email bodies unless explicitly approved

connectors.name: Supabase + Vercel + Stripe
connectors.purpose: Operate product backend, deploy surface and payment rails only after the relevant release gates exist.
connectors.auth_method: provider connectors or scoped CLI auth
connectors.human_gate: HG-3 for backend/deploy/payment writes; HG-4 for customer-impacting changes
connectors.memory_policy: never store service-role keys, payment details or customer secrets

connectors.name: Upload-Post + Social + Analytics
connectors.purpose: Support marketing attribution, publishing, social analytics and department-specific growth loops.
connectors.auth_surface: Upload-Post, LinkedIn, analytics, CRM and social tools
safe_preflight: Classify publishing vs analytics scopes separately
connectors.human_gate: HG-4 before public publishing or brand voice changes
connectors.memory_policy: archive exports in approved raw folders; do not persist private cookies or session storage
